generic_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings.
When adding range constraints, use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations from the case.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees; avoid implementation-only paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree { ... };` to enclose AGREE contracts.
Define boolean range checks as `eq name : bool = expression;`
anti_patterns: Do not include AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions unless they are exposed as typed ports or constants.
Avoid using subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
